nodes.name: The sky
nodes.summary: The sky was cloudy and overcast throughout the day.

nodes.name: Speaker
nodes.summary:
Rain fell lightly during the afternoon hours as observed by the Speaker
The door made a creaking sound as it shut, which was heard somewhere in the distance, presumably affecting the Speaker.

nodes.name: Dr. Alice Chen

Dr. Alice Chen is the lead researcher at the Stanford Oncology Lab.
Dr. Alice Chen keeps her access code 7-ECHO-4 stored in a locked drawer.
